about.title: About Novus Surfaces
about.subtitle: Your premium surface coatings distributor — Worldwide delivery

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Novus Surfaces was born from the belief that every surface deserves an exceptional coating. In partnership with SCI Coatings, a Montreal-based manufacturer recognized for over 13 years, we offer the world the most high-performance coating systems on the market.
story.p2: Our model is simple: we select the best products, provide impeccable technical support, and deliver directly from the factory to your job site, anywhere in the world.

partnership.title: SCI Coatings Partnership

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Contractors and owners who chose Novus Surfaces

item1.quote: The SCI Metallic system completely transformed our showroom. Customers are impressed the moment they walk in. Flawless installation.
item1.name: Marc Tremblay

item2.quote: We tried 3 suppliers before Novus. The quality difference is striking. The polyurea stands up to Quebec salt like nothing else.
item2.name: Sophie Lavoie

item3.quote: Exceptional technical support. Michael at SCI guided us every step of the way. The result is magazine-worthy.
item3.name: Jean-Philippe Côté

item4.quote: We did our entire 15,000 sq ft warehouse floor. Fast delivery, solid product. It's been 2 years and not a single crack.
item4.name: David Chen

item5.quote: The online calculator gave us a fair price. No surprises at delivery. Exactly what we were looking for for our restaurant.
item5.name: Marie-Ève Bouchard

lpGarage.title: Your garage deserves a floor that
lpGarage.subtitle: Professional epoxy coating starting at $2.75/sq ft. 1-day installation available. Guaranteed against salt, calcium, and chemicals.
lpGarage.benefit3: Protection against oil, salt, and chemicals
lpGarage.benefit4: Transforms your garage into living space
lpGarage.review1: My garage survived 2 winters without a single mark. Salt does nothing. Impressive.
lpGarage.review2: We did our double garage in 1 day with polyurea. Next day the car was on it. Perfect.
lpGarage.review3: 3 years later, the floor still looks brand new. Best home investment.
lpGarage.footerText: 2026 Novus Surfaces. Made in Canada. Worldwide delivery.

lpGym.title: Performance flooring for
lpGym.subtitle: Epoxy and polyurea coatings designed for gyms, CrossFit boxes, and fitness centers. Anti-slip, impact resistant, easy to clean.

lpGym.benefit1: Anti-slip finish even when wet — maximum safety
lpGym.benefit2: Impact resistant to heavy weights and equipment drops
lpGym.benefit3: Easy to clean and disinfect daily
lpGym.benefit4: Custom colors and floor zone markings
lpGym.vp1Desc: High friction coefficient for athlete safety, even in wet areas.
lpGym.vp2Desc: Withstands drops from weights, dumbbells, and heavy equipment without cracking.
lpGym.vp3Desc: Non-porous surface, easy to disinfect. Resistant to cleaning products.

lpGym.review1: We redid the entire floor of our CrossFit box. Athletes love the grip and it's super easy to clean after workouts.
lpGym.review2: The gym is open 16 hours a day and the floor holds up perfectly. Weights drop on it daily, zero damage.
lpGym.review3: The colors we chose to mark different zones give an ultra-professional look. Our members are impressed.
lpGym.footerText: 2026 Novus Surfaces. Made in Canada. Worldwide delivery.

curingConditions.title: Your Curing Weather
curingConditions.subtitle: Check if conditions are right for applying your epoxy coating. Real-time temperature, humidity, and precipitation data.
curingConditions.statusDesc_ideal: Temperature, humidity, and precipitation are all within optimal ranges. You can apply your coating with confidence.
curingConditions.statusDesc_caution: Conditions are borderline. Consult a specialist before proceeding with application.
curingConditions.statusDesc_unfavorable: It's too cold, too humid, or rain is expected. Postpone application to a more favorable day.
curingConditions.errorNotFound: Postal code not found. Check format (e.g. H2X 1Y4).
curingConditions.errorGeneric: Unable to fetch weather data. Try again in a moment.
curingConditions.emptyState: Enter your postal code to check curing conditions in your area.
curingConditions.tip: Weather data provided by Open-Meteo. 24h forecast.
curingConditions.disclaimer: * Displayed conditions are for reference only. Always consult the product data sheet for exact curing specifications.

installation.processSubtitle: From consultation to curing, we handle everything

0.title: Consultation
0.description: Free on-site assessment. We evaluate your surface, discuss your needs, and recommend the ideal system.

1.title: Surface Prep
1.description: Professional diamond grinding or shot-blasting to create the perfect concrete profile for adhesion.

2.title: Application
2.description: Multi-layer system applied by our certified crew using professional-grade equipment and techniques.

3.title: Curing
3.description: Controlled curing process. Most systems are walk-ready in 24h and vehicle-ready in 72h.

installation.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our installation services

0.question: How long does a typical installation take?
0.answer: Most residential installations (garages, basements) are completed in 1-2 days. Larger commercial projects may take 3-5 days depending on the system selected and surface area. Polyurea systems offer the fastest turnaround with 24-hour return to service.

1.question: Do I need to prepare anything before installation?
1.answer: Simply clear the area of all items and ensure access to power and water. Our team handles all surface preparation, including grinding, crack repair, and cleaning. We'll provide a detailed checklist when you book your installation.

2.question: What temperature is required for installation?
2.answer: Ideal application temperature is between 10 and 30 degrees Celsius with humidity below 80%. Our team monitors conditions closely and can use fast-cure formulations in borderline conditions. Use our free Curing Conditions tool to check your local weather.

3.question: How soon can I use my floor after installation?
3.answer: Light foot traffic is typically possible after 24 hours. Vehicle traffic is recommended after 72 hours. Full chemical resistance is achieved after 7 days of curing. Polyurea systems achieve full cure even faster.

4.question: Do you offer warranties on installations?
4.answer: Yes. All professional installations include a full manufacturer warranty on materials plus our installation workmanship guarantee. Specific warranty terms vary by system — contact us for details on your chosen system.

5.question: Do you service areas outside of Quebec?
5.answer: Yes! While our primary installation team is based in Quebec, we have certified applicators across Canada. For DIY installations, we ship products nationwide and provide full technical support. Contact us with your location for availability.
